frame_analyses.description: Initial view showing the training setup with the Penrose drain visible on green background
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Setup appears standard with drain properly positioned

frame_analyses.description: Penrose drain with slit visible, can see two marks for suture placement
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Drain appears properly prepared with clear target marks

frame_analyses.description: Needle driver approaching drain with suture, beginning placement through first mark
Suture being pulled through drain, completing passage through both marks
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good suture positioning, appears accurately placed through marks

frame_analyses.description: Beginning first throw of surgeon's knot with double wrap visible
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper surgeon's knot formation with double throw being created

frame_analyses.description: Completing first throw tightening, surgeon's knot appears secure
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good knot tightening technique, knot appears well-formed

frame_analyses.description: Creating second throw, hands appear to have switched from first throw
Performing third and final throw with appropriate hand switching
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good completion of knot sequence with proper hand alternation

frame_analyses.description: Cutting suture ends near the knot
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Appropriate cutting technique close to knot

frame_analyses.description: Final view showing completed knot with cut suture ends, drain slit appears closed
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task completed successfully with secure knot and closed drain

knot_assessments.notes: Well-executed surgeon's knot with proper double throw
Good single throw with proper hand switching
Final single throw with appropriate hand switching, secure completion

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Drain slit appears well-closed with no visible gaps after knot tightening

technique_summary: Excellent performance with proper surgeon's knot formation, accurate suture placement, and correct hand switching between throws. The knot sequence was executed efficiently with good technical precision.
improvement_suggestions: Consider slightly faster suture placement to reduce overall time
Maintain consistent tension throughout knot tying
